rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (Long et al., 2023) and articulates the delta with CausalDebate.
rationale.R1.7: Flags one missing citation for Kıcıman et al. (2023).
rationale.RX.1: Does not mark uncertainty or evidence gaps explicitly, but provides some qualitative disclosure in the text.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content, but does not identify harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Non-cosmetic changes are traced, but every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
